summary: Added a four-workflow (new/stacked/update/amend) selection front-end to the /pr command. A new STEP 1b resolves the workflow and PR-derived branch variables before any branch or CI work; three new flags (--stacked [PR], --update [PR], --amend [PR]) with auto-detect-always-confirm drive the choice; STEP 4/5/5b and STEP 10 branch conditionally on $workflow with per-workflow AskUserQuestion approval gates, dry-run previews, and the amend path using git push --force-with-lease. STEP 0/0.5 review paths are untouched.

artifacts.summary: 6-phase implementation summary covering flag parsing, STEP 1b insertion, STEP 4/5/5b branching, STEP 10 push/create logic, docs updates, and final structural verification — all 6 phases completed with zero deviations from plan.
